snippet: Any person using a school bus service provided as part of the SBP must comply with the conditions of travel. The conditions of travel are specified in the application forms for the service. Please refer to Resources to access the relevant application form. Introduction Guidance chapter introducing the School Bus Program and how ... Criteria determining eligibility for the...
